task.json description specifies this exact activity name; verifier.py line 78 allows case-insensitive matching

privileged_info_summary: The task upload_scorm_training_module@1 is a synthetic task where all data is generated during setup. The SCORM 1.2 package is programmatically created during setup_task.sh with valid imsmanifest.xml and index.html files, then zipped to /home/ga/Documents/fire_safety_scorm.zip. The course 'Firefighter Certification Program' (FIRE101) is created in the Moodle database. The agent must upload this SCORM package as activity 'Fire Safety Certification - Module 1' with grading method set to 'Highest grade' (grademethod=1) and maximum attempts set to 3. Admin credentials are username='admin' with password='Admin1234!'. The verification checks 6 criteria across 100 points with a 60-point pass threshold, requiring the activity to exist, have the correct name, have the package uploaded, use the correct grading method, have 3 max attempts, and be created during the task session (anti-gaming).
